constraints.text: carries the EXPLICIT/TRACE FORMULA (primes <-> spectrum, Tr = sum over primes)
constraints.note: Connes: the scaling flow's trace IS the explicit formula. Holds without RH.

constraints.text: has the right GLOBAL DENSITY of zeros/eigenvalues (Weyl law ~ (T/2pi)log T)
constraints.note: Both the arithmetic count and Berry-Keating xp give this density.

constraints.text: has GUE local statistics (level repulsion, sine kernel, rigidity)
constraints.note: Montgomery-Odlyzko (numerics) + random-matrix universality. Class, not individual.
Arithmetic: theta reciprocity. Spectral: the s<->1-s symmetry of the flow / T-duality shape.

constraints.text: a canonical FROBENIUS endomorphism over Z (an actual morphism, not analogy)
constraints.note: Borger lambda-rings supply Frobenius LIFTS; no operator realizes them spectrally yet.

constraints.text: lives on the arithmetic SURFACE Spec Z x_{F_1} Spec Z (a real 2-diml object)
constraints.note: Connes-Consani arithmetic site is defined; its spectral incarnation is partial.

constraints.text: a concrete SELF-ADJOINT operator H = H* on a Hilbert space
constraints.note: Berry-Keating xp / Connes adele-class operator: right density, not yet a true self-adjoint H.

constraints.text: UNITARY dynamics / a positive Hilbert-space inner product (norms >= 0)
constraints.note: Physics' unitarity positivity exists in general; the SPECIFIC space for the zeros does not.

constraints.text: THE CROSSING: side A would need Frobenius degree-form W(f) >= 0; side B would need H self-adjoint with spectrum = the zeros. Each, under its own strong hypotheses, would yield RH.
constraints.note: This is the one door. CONJECTURAL status (NOT a theorem): Connes shows RH is equivalent to positivity of a TRACE PAIRING; no theorem identifies the arithmetic construction (A) with the spectral one (B), nor proves 'W(f)>=0' and 'H=H*' are literally the same statement. The programme HOPES they are one object. Neither side reaches it. Force it in by hand on either side -> CIRCULAR (the gate rejects on provenance, exactly like the F_1 'unity-defined-to-work' control).

verdict: JOINT VOID: programme CONJECTURES a single shared line Z (arithmetic W(f)>=0 and spectral H=H* as one object). NOT a theorem -- Connes ties RH to trace-pairing positivity; no result fuses the two constructions. Floor met; faces at most half-built; fusion line is the wall.
scope: SPEC of the conjectured both-object. NOT a proof, NOT a theorem.
